programs.title: War Machines S1 - "Mastering Arms"
programs.desc: A weapon that has built Empires, toppled Kingdoms, and slaughtered millions, the story of the gun and how it has evolved throughout the centuries is long.

programs.title: War Machines S1 - "Advancing Destruction"
programs.desc: This episode tells the story of that journey showcasing both big and the small artillery and the impact they have had on warfare.

programs.title: War Machines S1 - "Triumphant On Land"
programs.desc: Highlighting some of the most influential movers ever to take to the battlefield including some of the most infamous tanks.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Simulated Warfare"
programs.desc: Modern tech is reshaping battlefields and training. This episode explores simulators and tools that prepare soldiers for combat.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Full Spectrum Warfare"
programs.desc: Modern warfare spans land, sea, and air. This episode explores training for Full Spectrum Warfare across all environments.

programs.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Airborne Artillery"
programs.desc: Airborne artillery brings heavy firepower behind enemy lines. At Fort Bragg, we witness elite crews train with precision, strategy, and skill.
